title: calamagrostis epigejos var. extremiorientalis
intro: Calamagrostis epigejos var. extremiorientalis, also known as the meadow fescue, is a subspecies of the tall grass Calamagrostis epigejos, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calamagrostis epigejos var. extremiorientalis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
